title: Pelecyphora macromeris
taxonomy: Pelecyphora macromeris is classified in the kingdom Plantae, in the clade Angiosperms, in the class Magnoliopsida, in the order Caryophyllales, and in the family Cactaceae, specifically within the subfamily Cactoideae. It is a type of cactus native to Mexico. This classification reflects its unique characteristics, including its succulent stems and adaptation to arid environments. The plant's classification also highlights its evolutionary relationships with other plants within the cactus family. Further study of the plant's morphology and genetics continues to refine its classification within the plant kingdom.
